creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Thank you for noticing this and the patch made it clear to me how to use
single options.

This is not exactly what I was trying to accomplish though, because
single options require at least one of them to be selected.

This port, instead, can also be build without both of FFMPEG and FAME
selected.

If strictly required to remove the IGNORE hack I can accept your
correction. But I'd rather give the user the option to build it without
any multimedia dependency.

Is there another way to accomplish 0 or 1 from a set of options?

-- 
Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
